title: CCS Embedding
description: Cognitive Coordinate System structural embedding. 6-axis characterization of an entity derived from observable features.

entity_id.description: Unique identifier for the entity. Format is domain-defined (e.g., 'music.track:slug').

ccs_version.description: Version of the CCS specification used to compute this embedding.

ccs_embedding.description: The 6-axis structural embedding. All axes are required. All values in [0.0, 1.0].

attractor_stability.description: Degree to which structural patterns recur identically within the entity. 0=no repetition, 1=exact loop.

generative_constraint.description: Degree to which the event space is restricted by detectable compositional rules. 0=unconstrained, 1=maximally constrained.

recurrence_depth.description: Fraction of hierarchical recurrence levels detected (motif/phrase/section/form). 0=none, 1=all four levels.

structural_density.description: Rate of structural events per unit time, domain-normalized. 0=sparse, 1=maximally dense.

control_entropy.description: Normalized Shannon entropy of control signal distributions (pitch, dynamics, articulation). 0=uniform/constant, 1=maximally varied.

basin_permeability.description: Degree to which structural transitions between sections are gradual. 0=hard cuts only, 1=fully continuous.

evidence.description: Observable features and named signals that produced this embedding. Required for all non-placeholder embeddings.

signals.description: Named measurable signals used as axis inputs. Each signal traces to one axis.

name.description: Signal name (must match a named observable in the SPEC for the relevant axis).

axis.description: The CCS axis this signal contributes to.

source_features.description: Names or paths of source artifacts used (e.g., analysis file, VGM path, tag source).

notes.description: Computation notes. Document data gaps, approximations, edge cases, or manual adjustments with justification.

confidence.description: Data completeness score. Reflects how complete the input data was during embedding computation. See SPEC.md Section 4 for range definitions.

computed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of embedding computation (optional, for provenance).

source_version.description: Optional version identifier of the source data or analysis pipeline that produced this embedding.
